description:
The Mapped Drive Desktop Client allows easy editing of files from a traditional mapped drive from within applications remotely from anywhere. Opening and editing design files, databases, programs and very large files is not supported.


- Updated application tracking for file lock management in office applications
- Updated logging related to application tracking when detailed log level enabled
- Fixed a bug which displayed Add to Zip in context menu of file paths outside MyWorkDrive shares
- Updated file writing method for AD/SMB Share types
- Fixed a bug opening office documents Online/web browser from DLP restricted shares
- Added scripted commands for timeout settings to command line install
